title: Indulgent Thai Chicken Tagine
description: A rich and spicy Thai dish from the Isaan region, made with tender chicken and a flaky, wine-infused crust, featuring Speculaas spice mix and cooked to perfection in a traditional tagine. This keto-friendly recipe is perfect for a special occasion or a romantic dinner.

ingredients.name: Speculaas spice mix
ingredients.notes: available at most spice stores or online

instructions: Season the chicken thighs with salt and black pepper.
In a large skillet, heat the coconut oil over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken thighs until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes per side.
Transfer the chicken to a traditional tagine or a Dutch oven with a tight-fitting lid.
In the same skillet, cook the chopped onions and grated ginger until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the Speculaas spice mix, lemon juice, fish sauce, and brown sugar to the skillet, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Return the chicken thighs to the skillet and transfer the entire mixture to the preheated oven.
Bake for 30-40 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Remove the tagine from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
